calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: THE FULLMAN FIRM, PC'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR AMARA OKOLI)

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion for withdrawal of attorney of record is granted. Counsel to submit a proposed order on the appropriate Judicial Council form. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; Declaration In Support; Request For Judical Notice
Off Calendar Apr-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed motion to enter judgment pursuant to the terms of the parties' settlement and Code of Civil Procedure, section 664.6, is granted. For good cause shown in the moving papers, Plaintiff is entitled to judgment in the amount of $15,342.04, inclusive of costs. Plaintiff shall prepare and submit a proposed form of order and a separate proposed judgment. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-15-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Set For Trial On Sep-22-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
